hero.description: Real feedback from 445+ off-road and overlanding enthusiasts on suspension kits, shipping, and support.

about.paragraph1: Mudify is an online off-road and overlanding accessories retailer headquartered in Miami, Florida. They specialize in suspension systems, lift kits, armor, recovery gear, and camping equipment for 4x4 vehicles of all platforms.
about.paragraph2: Authorized dealer for the industry's leading brands. Offers vehicle-specific build guidance, financing through Affirm & Snap Finance, and discounts for military and first responders.
about.brands: Old Man Emu, Fox Shocks, Bilstein, King Shocks, Dobinsons, BDS Suspension, ARB, Warn, Icon
about.vehicles: Toyota 4Runner, Tacoma, Jeep Wrangler, Ford Bronco, RAM 1500/2500, Ford F-150, Lexus GX

highlights.title: Responsive Service
highlights.body: Staff described as knowledgeable, patient, and proactive. Specific team members are called out by name in multiple reviews.

highlights.title: Fast Shipping
highlights.body: Buyers frequently note well-packaged deliveries arriving in perfect condition, often ahead of schedule.

highlights.title: Product Expertise
highlights.body: Customers value honest, vehicle-specific advice. Staff regularly steer customers away from unnecessary parts.

highlights.title: Stock Delays
highlights.body: A minority flag inventory gaps or fulfillment delays. Most cases were resolved, though resolution times vary.

contact.phone_note: Available during business hours · Miami, FL

faq.q: Is Mudify a legitimate and trustworthy company?
faq.a: Yes. Mudify is a legitimate off-road accessories retailer based in Miami, FL with 445+ verified reviews and a 4.3/5 average rating. They are an authorized dealer for Old Man Emu, Fox, Bilstein, King Shocks, Dobinsons, and more.

faq.q: How is Mudify's customer service quality?
faq.a: Mudify's customer service is consistently their highest-rated attribute. Reviews praise responsive communication, knowledgeable staff, and honest advice. Team members Samantha and Eddie have been specifically named in positive reviews.

faq.q: How fast does Mudify ship, and is packaging reliable?
faq.a: Most customers report fast shipping with well-packaged deliveries arriving in perfect condition. Delays have been noted on specific suspension components during supply chain disruptions.

faq.q: What off-road brands does Mudify carry?
faq.a: Mudify carries Old Man Emu (OME), Fox Shocks, Bilstein, King Shocks, Dobinsons, BDS Suspension, Icon Vehicle Dynamics, ARB, Warn Winches, and many more.

faq.q: Does Mudify offer financing or special discounts?
faq.a: Yes. Mudify offers flexible financing through Affirm and Snap Finance. They also provide discounts for military personnel and first responders. Contact them at (786) 699-8829 for current promotions.

faq.q: How does Mudify handle returns and product issues?
faq.a: Based on reviews, Mudify generally resolves product issues through their customer service team. Calling directly at (786) 699-8829 yields faster results than email.
